label: Analyst Assessment
definition: Analysis based on Aberdeen Group analyst evaluation and judgment

label: Vendor Claim
definition: Statistic or claim sourced from vendor-provided data

label: Public Record
definition: Fact verified from public records, press releases, or historical sources

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classification of an entity's strategic positioning or approach

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking prediction about a technology or company's viability

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Documented actual outcome of a prior prediction or claim

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's capabilities or characteristics

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Result from a formal or informal benchmark comparison

label: Framework Factor
definition: Factor identified as part of a framework or structured analysis

label: Market Data
definition: Market size, share, or adoption metric

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Opinion or judgment from a recognized industry expert
